description: API Sheriff is a security-focused, lightweight API Gateway built on Quarkus and Java virtual threads — a purpose-built reverse proxy providing cui-http inbound security filtering, offline bearer-token validation, and (in later variants) OIDC confidential-client BFF token mediation. Pre-1.0: the current code delivers a minimal pass-through proxy plus the build/IT/benchmark harness; configuration management and the full request pipeline follow the plans under doc/plan/.
description_reasoning: source: doc/README.adoc introduction + root pom description + doc/plan/README.adoc plan sequence
name: API-Sheriff
